DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF CLAIMANT LISA P. CHOW) IS DENIED IN PART. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR FAILED TO SHOW THAT HER ENTIRE MONTHLY INCOME IS NEEDED FOR HER SUPPORT. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE $350 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. THE REMAINING AMOUNT OF $690.23 SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. BEGINNING DECEMBER 1, 2011, JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $350.00 ON THE JUDGMENT UNTIL IT IS SATISFIED IN FULL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; NOT REPORTED.
AMENDED ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (GRANTED IN PART; SEE ORDER FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption (Of Claimant Lisa P. Chow) Continued From 10/31/11
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBIN D. HART, TEL. NO. (510) 273-2435 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Hearing On Claim Of Exemption (Of Claimant Lisa P. Chow) IS Denied in part. The judgment debtor failed to show that her entire monthly income is needed for her support. The levying officer is directed to release $350 to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. The remaining amount of $690.23 shall be released to the judgment debtor. Beginning December 1, 2011, judgment debtor shall make monthly payments of $350.00 on the judgment until it is satisfied in full. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller; Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-31-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF CLAIMANT LISA P.CHOW).

APPEARANCES: Robert F. Cohen, Esq. of Law Office of Robert F. Cohen (310)858-9771/(800)492-2657 for pltf; Lisa P. Chow, claimant.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 11/14/11 at 9:00am. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
